CatImpact.description: A projected category total for the optimal lineup (display string + trend).
CatImpact.title: CatImpact

DailyMeta.description: Day-level context for the daily optimizer (populated only when mode='daily').
DailyMeta.title: DailyMeta

FaSuggestion.description:
A 'drop X for available Y' free-agent upgrade, alongside the LP lineup.

Composed from recommend_fa_moves(ctx) over the optimize context. The LP still
optimizes the CURRENT roster; these are the available-pickup layer.
FaSuggestion.title: FaSuggestion

IpPace.description: Weekly innings-pitched pacing for the daily view (from ip_tracker).
IpPace.title: IpPace

LeagueMatchup.description:
One of the week's head-to-head matchups, for the league scoreboard.

`a`/`b` reuse TeamSide (name/manager/record/score) — the frontend's LeagueTeam
shape is identical. `score` is each team's this-week category-win count.
LeagueMatchup.title: LeagueMatchup

Lever.description: The single biggest category weakness + suggested pickups to fix it.
Lever.title: Lever

LeverPickup.description: A free-agent suggested to address the lever (weakest) category.
LeverPickup.title: LeverPickup

Mover.description: A hot/cold player on the user's roster (trending vs projection).
Mover.title: Mover

OpsCard.description: One operational dashboard card (IP pace, moves left, roster health).
OpsCard.title: OpsCard

OptimizeJobRef.description:
Handle returned by POST /api/lineup/optimize/start — the client polls
/optimize/result/{job_id} until status is 'done' or 'error'.
OptimizeJobRef.title: OptimizeJobRef

OptimizeJobResult.description:
Polled job state from GET /api/lineup/optimize/result/{job_id}.

status: "running" (still computing) | "done" (result populated) | "error" (error set).
OptimizeJobResult.title: OptimizeJobResult

PageContext.description:
Structured snapshot of what the page is currently displaying, attached to
a chat turn so Bubba can 'see the screen'. `data_json` is a (size-capped,
possibly truncated) JSON string the frontend serializes from the page's
loaded data; `page` is the route id (e.g. 'optimizer').
PageContext.title: PageContext

Record.description: Structured win-loss-tie record (additive complement to the display string).
Record.title: Record

StatItem.description:
A single labeled stat for display, e.g. {label: "HR", value: "18"}.

Shared across pages (free agents, team movers/lever, …). The frontend renders
label + value; counting stats are integer strings, rate stats pre-formatted.
StatItem.title: StatItem

StatusChip.description: A small dashboard status badge (IL count, news count, …).
StatusChip.title: StatusChip

Swap.description: A recommended move: start this currently-benched player in `slot`.
Swap.title: Swap

ToolTraceEntry.description: One tool call in the AI assistant's trace (name + args).
ToolTraceEntry.title: ToolTraceEntry

BearerAuth.description: Clerk session JWT. Required on write + Pro/admin endpoints; harmless on open reads. Per-operation security requirements are annotated progressively as each phase hardens its routes.

401.description: Authentication required: missing or invalid bearer token.
Authentication required: missing or invalid bearer token.
Authentication required: missing or invalid bearer token.

400.description: Invalid or missing Stripe webhook signature.

402.description: Pro subscription required (when billing is enabled).
Pro subscription required (when billing is enabled).
Pro subscription required (when billing is enabled).
Pro subscription required (when billing is enabled).

get.description: Poll a background optimize job. 404 if the job id is unknown/expired.

402.description: Pro subscription required (when billing is enabled).

post.description:
Kick off an optimize in the background (so Enhanced/FA can run ~3min past the
Vercel gateway timeout) and return a job handle immediately. The client polls
/lineup/optimize/result/{job_id}. Team resolution mirrors the sync route.

402.description: Pro subscription required (when billing is enabled).

401.description: Authentication required: missing or invalid bearer token.

402.description: Pro subscription required (when billing is enabled).

parameters.description: Fallback viewer team (used only when Clerk is off)
parameters.name: team_name

schema.description: Fallback viewer team (used only when Clerk is off)
schema.title: Team Name

schema.title: Team Name
